allow: Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent 2>/dev/null | wc -c')

Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects 2>/dev/null | wc -c')

Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent > /tmp/httpx-output.txt 2>/tmp/httpx-stderr.txt; echo ""exit=$?""; echo ""stdout_bytes=$\(wc -c < /tmp/httpx-output.txt\)""; echo ""stderr_bytes=$\(wc -c < /tmp/httpx-stderr.txt\)""; cat /tmp/httpx-output.txt')

Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent < /dev/null > /tmp/httpx-output2.txt 2>/dev/null; echo ""exit=$?""; wc -c < /tmp/httpx-output2.txt')

Bash(docker exec -w / deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent < /dev/null > /tmp/httpx-output3.txt 2>/dev/null; wc -c < /tmp/httpx-output3.txt')

Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-2 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" > /tmp/httpx-test.txt && httpx -list /tmp/httpx-test.txt -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent < /dev/null > /tmp/httpx-out.txt 2>/dev/null; echo ""exit=$?""; wc -c < /tmp/httpx-out.txt')

Bash(docker exec deployments-worker-1 sh -c 'echo ""http://testphp.vulnweb.com"" | httpx -list /dev/stdin -json -status-code -title -tech-detect -content-length -content-type -cdn -response-time -follow-redirects -silent > /tmp/httpx-stdin-out.txt 2>/dev/null; echo ""exit=$?""; wc -c < /tmp/httpx-stdin-out.txt')
